name: Grilled Picante Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breasts (skinned and boned, and cut in half)
recipeInstructions:
(found in Mexican food section of market)
Mix the picante sauce, sugar substitute, and mustard together.
Marinate the chicken breasts in this mixture for 4 to 8 hours in the refrigerator.
When the coals have turned white, place the chicken breasts on the grill. Turn after about five minutes. They should be done in 10-15 minutes.
Using a long-handled brush and wearing mitts, brush the marinade onto the chicken while grilling.
One serving (1/2 breast) = 4 Lean-Meat Exchanges; 154 calories; 3 gm carbohydrate; 27 gm protein; 3 gm fat; 0 gm fiber; 217 mg sodium; 73 mg cholesterol.
